meaning: n.感谢,感激,正确评价,欣赏,增值
examples: You have to take capital appreciation of the property into account.
The aim is to inculcate businesspeople with an appreciation of different cultures.
She shows little appreciation of good music.
Those that have are seeing the upside in terms of revenue and customer appreciation.
Tea ceremonies, tea appreciation and tasting services led by skilful tea masters, may feature any of the above.
